tasks.name: Add responsive sizes to Product Preview images

action.target: responsive sizes to Product Preview images

tasks.purpose: Ensure Product Preview section images have responsive sizes attribute matching layout breakpoints for optimal LCP and CLS

constraints: sizes must match actual rendered width at each breakpoint
Hero image already has priority flag (line 110)

tasks.input_state: Product Preview section in page.tsx uses OptimizedImage but lacks responsive sizes attribute
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Product Preview OptimizedImage has sizes attribute matching hero pattern

tasks.name: Add blur placeholders to all marketing images

action.target: blur placeholders to all marketing images

tasks.purpose: Add blur placeholders to all Next.js Images to prevent CLS during image loading and improve perceived performance

constraints: Use placeholder='blur' for local images
Use blurDataURL for remote images
Hero image has priority, may not need blur

tasks.input_state: Marketing images load without blur placeholders, causing layout shifts
tasks.output_state: All marketing images have blur placeholders preventing CLS during load
tasks.acceptance_criterion: All OptimizedImage instances in page.tsx have placeholder='blur' or blurDataURL

tasks.name: Create section skeleton components
tasks.purpose: Create reusable skeleton loading states for each section type to use as Suspense fallbacks

constraints: Skeletons should match approximate dimensions of actual sections
Use generic placeholders, not exact content

tasks.input_state: Generic SectionLoader exists but lacks section-specific loading states
tasks.output_state: Section-specific skeleton components for Hero, Features, Testimonials, Pricing, Blog sections
tasks.acceptance_criterion: section-skeleton.tsx exists with exported skeleton components for each section type

tasks.name: Add Suspense boundaries with dynamic imports for below-fold sections

action.target: Suspense boundaries with dynamic imports for below-fold sections

tasks.purpose: Wrap sections 3-12 (Logo Cloud through Blog) in Suspense with dynamic imports to defer JavaScript loading until needed

constraints: Hero and Product Preview sections remain eager (above-fold)
Sections 3-12 wrapped in Suspense with ssr: false where appropriate
Use existing Suspense pattern from logo cloud (line 121)

tasks.input_state: All sections load eagerly, increasing initial bundle size
tasks.output_state: Below-fold sections wrapped in Suspense with dynamic imports, skeletons as fallbacks
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Logo Cloud, Sticky Scroll, Features, Testimonials, Pricing, Blog sections wrapped in Suspense with dynamic imports

tasks.name: Add Safari fallback for backdrop-filter
tasks.purpose: Add CSS @supports fallback for backdrop-filter: blur() to ensure glass cards work in Safari with solid background fallback

constraints: Fallback should use solid background color matching dark theme
Apply to all glass card classes

tasks.input_state: Glass cards rely on backdrop-filter without fallback, may break in Safari
tasks.output_state: @supports rule provides solid background fallback when backdrop-filter unsupported
tasks.acceptance_criterion: globals.css contains @supports (backdrop-filter: blur()) with solid background fallback

tasks.name: Verify LazyMotion code-splitting in bundle
tasks.purpose: Analyze production bundle to confirm MotionProvider successfully code-splits domAnimation to separate ~15KB chunk

constraints: Verify domAnimation or domMax loads as separate chunk
Chunk size should be ~15KB, not ~34KB full bundle

tasks.input_state: MotionProvider should be implemented in I1, bundle splitting unverified
tasks.output_state: Production bundle analyzed, domAnimation confirmed as code-split chunk
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Build analysis shows Motion code-split with chunk size <20KB gzipped

tasks.name: Iterate Lighthouse performance fixes to reach >= 90 score

action.target: Lighthouse performance fixes to reach >= 90 score

tasks.purpose: Run Lighthouse performance audit on homepage and iteratively apply fixes until score reaches >= 90

dependencies: Completed T1, T2, T4, T6 optimizations
constraints: Target score >= 90
LCP < 2.5s
CLS < 0.1
INP < 200ms
Apply fixes iteratively based on audit results

tasks.input_state: Homepage with image optimization, Suspense boundaries, code-splitting implemented
tasks.output_state: Lighthouse performance score >= 90 with documented fixes applied
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Lighthouse performance score >= 90, LCP < 2.5s, CLS < 0.1, INP < 200ms

tasks.name: Iterate Lighthouse accessibility fixes to reach >= 95 score

action.target: Lighthouse accessibility fixes to reach >= 95 score

tasks.purpose: Run Lighthouse accessibility audit on homepage and iteratively apply fixes until score reaches >= 95

constraints: Target score >= 95
Fix contrast issues, ARIA labels, keyboard navigation
Ensure prefers-reduced-motion support
Apply fixes iteratively based on audit results

tasks.input_state: Homepage with Safari fallback and Suspense boundaries implemented
tasks.output_state: Lighthouse accessibility score >= 95 with documented fixes applied
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Lighthouse accessibility score >= 95, WCAG AA compliance verified

tasks.name: Test cross-browser rendering in Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge

action.target: cross-browser rendering in Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge

tasks.purpose: Verify all homepage sections render correctly across Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge browsers, fix browser-specific issues

constraints: No console errors in any browser
backdrop-filter works in Safari (or has fallback from T5)
Animations work in all browsers
Layout is consistent across browsers

tasks.output_state: Homepage verified to work correctly in Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge with no console errors
tasks.acceptance_criterion: All sections render correctly in 4 major browsers with no console errors
tasks.verification_command: echo 'Manual browser testing required - Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge'
